summary: Reposted Newsmax interview segment. A man in a dark suit and glasses speaks as a remote guest against a Washington skyline backdrop with the Capitol behind. A lower-third reads 'FRAUD FEARS / APPROVALS FOR GREEN CARDS DROP UNDER TRUMP,' with a 'LIVE' tag and a news ticker. The audio is the guest describing a review of past immigration approvals and a drop in green-card approvals.

script.scene: Man in a suit and glasses speaks as a remote Newsmax guest before a DC skyline; chyron 'FRAUD FEARS / APPROVALS FOR GREEN CARDS DROP UNDER TRUMP.'
